title: Tap 'GET STARTED' button
module: Contact Identification and Caller Information Search
preconditions: App is open and on the home screen
test_steps: Tap the 'GET STARTED' button | Verify that the app navigates to the contact search screen
expected_result: The app should navigate to the contact search screen

title: Tap text field for entering a phone number
module: Contact Identification and Caller Information Search
preconditions: App is open and on the contact search screen
test_steps: Tap the text field for entering a phone number | Enter a phone number and tap the 'Search' button | Verify that the search results are displayed
expected_result: The search results should be displayed

title: Tap profile picture
module: Contact Identification and Caller Information Search
preconditions: App is open and on the contact search screen
test_steps: Tap the profile picture | Verify that the user's profile is displayed
expected_result: The user's profile should be displayed

title: Tap social media icons
module: Contact Identification and Caller Information Search
preconditions: App is open and on the contact search screen
test_steps: Tap the social media icons | Verify that the user is redirected to their respective social media profiles
expected_result: The user should be redirected to their respective social media profiles

title: Tap map with location pin
module: Contact Identification and Caller Information Search
preconditions: App is open and on the contact search screen
test_steps: Tap the map with location pin | Verify that the map view is displayed
expected_result: The map view should be displayed

title: Tap phone icon
module: Contact Identification and Caller Information Search
preconditions: App is open and on the contact search screen
test_steps: Tap the phone icon | Verify that the phone dialer is launched
expected_result: The phone dialer should be launched

title: Tap name
module: Contact Identification and Caller Information Search
preconditions: App is open and on the contact search screen
test_steps: Tap the name | Verify that the user's name is displayed
expected_result: The user's name should be displayed

title: Tap title
module: Contact Identification and Caller Information Search

test_steps: Tap the title | Verify that the user's title is displayed
expected_result: The user's title should be displayed

title: Tap location pin on the map
module: Contact Identification and Caller Information Search
